title: scutellaria glandulosa
intro: Scutellaria glandulosa, also known as the glandular skullcap, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to China and other parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Scutellaria glandulosa include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of fever and digestive issues. Scutellaria glandulosa can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
